name: China Merchants Fund Management Co. - Csi All Share Inv Bank and Brokerage Index Fund
summary: China Merchants Fund Management Co. - Csi All Share Inv Bank and Brokerage Index Fund is an index fund that tracks the performance of the CSI All Share Investment Bank and Brokerage Index. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to companies in the investment banking and brokerage industry in China. It is managed by China Merchants Fund Management Co., Ltd.
